Who We Are

Omniris Holdings is a multi-industry parent company focused on building and managing scalable, compliance-driven businesses. Through a portfolio of specialized companies, we deliver essential services across document security, insurance solutions, and legal-medical coordination — ensuring efficiency, compliance, and long-term value.

Landy D. Barthelemy
MBA, MHA · Founder & Managing Director
Founder

Landy D. Barthelemy, MBA, MHA

Founder & Managing Director

Landy D. Barthelemy, MBA, MHA, is the Founder and Managing Director of Omniris Holdings, a multi-industry organization focused on building and managing scalable, compliance-driven businesses.

With over 15 years of experience in the legal field, Landy has developed deep expertise in litigation support, case management, and operational systems. Her work has consistently centered on improving efficiency, ensuring regulatory compliance, and delivering structured solutions within complex environments.

She holds a Bachelor in Legal Studies, a Master of Business Administration (MBA) and a Master of Healthcare Administration (MHA), allowing her to bridge the gap between legal, healthcare, and business operations with a strategic and results-oriented approach.

“Omniris Holdings reflects her vision of creating a unified platform that delivers clarity, efficiency, and growth across multiple industries.”

Document Security

Echo Safe Shredding Pro

Secure and reliable document shredding services based in Palm Beach County, Florida.

About

About Echo Safe Shredding Pro

Echo Safe Shredding Pro, LLC is a Palm Beach County based document shredding company specializing in secure and tailored shredding solutions. With a commitment to confidentiality and data protection, they provide fast and reliable services to meet the unique needs of businesses across healthcare, legal, financial, and education sectors.

Services

What We Offer

One-Time Shredding

Secure one-time document purge for confidential information with guaranteed 2- or 3-day service options, available on-site or off-site.

Regular Shredding

Recurring scheduled pickups with secure locked consoles placed in your office, customized to accommodate your business hours.

Healthcare Shredding

HIPAA-compliant destruction of patient records, medical histories, and protected health information for healthcare organizations.

Legal Document Destruction

Secure disposal of case files, client communications, and privileged documents for law firms and legal departments.

Financial Services Shredding

Compliant destruction of financial records, customer data, and sensitive documents for banks and financial institutions.

Education Sector Shredding

Secure disposal of student records, academic files, and administrative documents for schools and educational institutions.

Regular
Weekly or bi-weekly scheduled service
Short-Term
Month-to-month for project needs
Long-Term
Annual agreements with priority scheduling

For complete service details, visit the Echo Safe Shredding Pro website.

Visit Echo Safe →

Insurance & Benefits

VitalBiz Broker Partners

Comprehensive insurance options for Palm Beach County residents and all of Florida.

About

About VitalBiz Broker Partners

VitalBiz Broker Partners is a leading insurance broker in Palm Beach County, Florida, dedicated to providing top-notch insurance options including health, dental, vision, life, Medicare/Medicaid, disability, and employer/employee group coverage. Their knowledgeable team provides personalized assistance in choosing the right plan for every client.

Services

What We Offer

Health Insurance

Comprehensive health coverage for medical expenses including doctor visits, hospital stays, and prescription medications.

Life Insurance

Customizable life insurance plans providing financial protection and a death benefit to secure your loved ones' future.

Dental Insurance

Affordable dental plans covering preventive care, basic procedures, and major treatments for individuals and families.

Vision Insurance

Financial assistance for eye care services including regular eye exams, glasses, and contact lenses.

Medicare & Medicaid

Guidance on Medicare Parts A, B, C, and D coverage options, including dental, vision, hearing, and prescription drug plans.

Disability Insurance

Short-term and long-term income replacement coverage for individuals unable to work due to illness or injury.

For complete service details, visit the VitalBiz Broker Partners website.

Visit VitalBiz →

Legal-Medical Services

LegalMed Liaison Network

Connecting injured clients with top doctors and lawyers across South Florida.

About

About LegalMed Liaison Network

LegalMed Liaison Network is a trusted organization based in Palm Beach County, Florida, serving Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami-Dade counties. They connect injured clients with top doctors and lawyers, providing comprehensive case management, medical coordination, and legal support to ensure clients receive the best care and representation during their recovery.

Services

What We Offer

Doctor Referral Services

Partnered with chiropractors, urgent care centers, hospitals, physical therapists, neurologists, and orthopedists for comprehensive medical support.

Attorney Referral Services

Connections with experienced personal injury attorneys who fight for maximum settlements in auto accidents, medical malpractice, and more.

Legal Case Management

Personalized case management including medical record coordination, settlement preparation, and lien reductions for law firms.

Medical-Legal Coordination

Seamless back-office support bridging communication between healthcare providers and legal counsel throughout the case lifecycle.

Paralegal Support

Administrative and logistical support for small law firms and solo attorneys, operating as an extension of your practice.

Compliance Consulting

Regulatory guidance for practices navigating the intersection of healthcare and legal frameworks in South Florida.

Regular
Ongoing retainer-based support
Short-Term
Per-case or project engagement
Long-Term
Embedded team placement for firms

For complete service details, visit the LegalMed Liaison Network website.

Visit LegalMed →
